title: rubus angustatus
intro: Rubus angustatus, also known as the Dwarf Raspberry or Chinese Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Rubus angustatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine.
